name: sandbox-world-simulation
description: Procedural 2D tile world with advanced water simulation (vanilla JS, no build step)

&& npm run test:pumps && npm run test:turrets && npm run test:spring-platform && npm run test:vending && npm run test:inventory && npm run test:save-schema && npm run test:debug-settings && npm run test:survival && npm run test:death-respawn && npm run test:movement && npm run test:cape && npm run test:necklace && npm run test:falling && npm run test:material-physics && npm run test:fog && npm
